description: Raw format_dict keys whose canonical mapping (EA/NEA/EAF/NEAF) varies across auto* presets. Omitted from auto_raw; merged from each preset by scripts/sync_auto_from_raw.py. Per preset, A{i}/REF/ALT and indexed frequencies (A{i}FREQ, Freq{i}) must stay aligned; scripts/check_auto_assumption_dict.py enforces this against format_name. Entries like reference_allele_frequency apply only to ref-style presets but must not be in auto_raw.
